example: Arthur is a shopkeeper who works hard to support his family.
I have a function tonight, so I need some money.
ja: イベント、社交の集まり

example: The bills are big this month, so we need to sell more.
You will figure it out, Dad. You always do.
ja: 解決策を見つける、理解する

example: Charles seems upset because he wants to leave the town.
We are grown up now and have our own dreams.
This shop is our bread and butter; it supports our family.
Do not give up, Arthur. Show them what you can do.
We can get good money and invest in something big.
They will appreciate your hard work one day.
I feel we are not close anymore as a family.
This shop fed you, clothed you, and educated you.
I refuse to sell my dignity for money.
You need to earn money to understand its value.
I am doing deliveries for Tom to make good money.
Is it legal to do this kind of work?
Robert is engaged to Gina and will take care of her father's business.
Arthur turned part of his shop into a cafe to attract more customers.
My income has increased since I opened the cafe.
You have cheated me by using company money for a car.
Charles was arrested for carrying illegal stuff.
We need ten thousand dollars to bail Charles out of jail.
They caught him with illegal packets, which is a crime.
The illegal stuff turned out to be ladies perfume for men.
